===== Find yoomd-graph-refresh-token script =====
  using: /home/azureuser/yoomd-graph-token.sh
  contents head:
#!/bin/bash
# Silently get a YooMD Graph access token using the persisted refresh token.
# Outputs the access token to stdout. Rotates refresh token in vault.
set -euo pipefail
CLIENT_ID=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e
TENANT=organizations
RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv)
[ -z "$RT" ] && { echo "ERROR: no refresh token" >&2; exit 1; }
RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=$CLIENT_ID" \
  --data-urlencode "grant_type=refresh_token" \
  

===== Try direct refresh-token exchange with broader scopes =====
